output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?guest ?guestLabel WHERE {
  ?episode wdt:P179 wd:Q13979 ; wdt:P31 wd:Q21191270 ; wdt:P577 ?date ; wdt:P5030 ?guest .
  ?guest rdfs:label ?guestLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?guestLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
